title: Modern Sword Blocking
description: Blockhitting brought back to Modern Versions!
body:
<details>
<summary>Info</summary>

The [Animatium](https://modrinth.com/mod/animatium) Mod was used to improve the animations but
everything works perfectly fine on vanilla Minecraft

**Please Note**:  
_This Plugin only properly works on 1.21.4_

</details>

✨ **𝗛𝗼𝘄 𝘁𝗼 𝗨𝘀𝗲:**
1. Download the latest release.
2. Drag and Drop the Plugin into your folder
3. Enjoy!
4. use /msb on/off to toggle the mod individually
for each player

🖼️ **𝗣𝗶𝗰𝘁𝘂𝗿𝗲𝘀:**
Here are some previews:

![Imgur](https://i.imgur.com/M9BDkIj.gif)  
*Blocking The Sword*

![Imgur](https://i.imgur.com/7m3OlOf.gif)  
*Blockhitting With The Sword*
